header.title: Complete your order

crypto.name: Cryptocurrency
crypto.subtext: Pay with BTC, ETH, USDT (+5% OFF)

bank.title: Awaiting connection
bank.body: After placing your order, an administrator will contact you at <1>{{email}}</1> with structured payment instructions.

crypto.title: Crypto efficiency discount
crypto.body: You have unlocked a 5% discount for choosing a cryptographically secure payment method. Total saved: <1>{{amount}}</1>

success.title: Research order secured
success.bankFollowUp: An admin will contact you shortly via email with transfer details.
success.defaultFollowUp: Your order is now being processed by our analytical team.
success.guestNote: Please save your order ID above. Since you checked out as a guest, this is your primary reference for correspondence.
success.whatsappMessage: Hi, this is {{name}}. I need assistance with my order #{{orderId}}.

messages.emailFailed: Order placed, but one or more transactional emails failed. Please contact support with your order ID.
messages.cryptoRedirectFailed: Order created, but automatic crypto redirect failed. {{detail}}
messages.cryptoRedirectFallback: Please contact support with your order ID.
messages.bankSuccess: Order created successfully. Admin and customer emails were sent. Bank transfer instructions will follow by email.
messages.orderSaved: Order saved successfully. Please use your order ID for support and payment follow-up.
messages.processFailed: Failed to process order. Please try again.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.vatNote: Prices in EUR. VAT applied where required at checkout based on your EU shipping country.
